de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class MergePointStatement

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
        • recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • recoder.java.statement.JavaStatement
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.MergePointStatement
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, ExpressionContainer, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, Statement, ModelElement

    public class MergePointStatement
extends JavaStatement
implements ExpressionContainer
